title: Client Red Flag Screening Decision Tree for Freelancers
description: Gives freelancers a visual yes/no decision tree to evaluate prospect calls and project briefs so they can confidently decline bad-fit clients before wasting proposal effort.
gumroad_description:
STOP WRITING PROPOSALS FOR CLIENTS WHO WILL DRAIN YOUR SOUL

You've been burned before. A vague brief. Last-minute scope creep. Payment delays. A client who won't stop changing their mind. You know the warning signs, but you don't trust yourself to say no fast enough—so you write the proposal anyway and waste 3 hours discovering halfway through you should have declined.

This decision tree fixes that.

WHO THIS IS FOR

— Freelance designers, developers, or copywriters who lose 5+ hours monthly on doomed projects
— Solo service providers tired of feeling guilty about firing bad clients mid-project
— Anyone who's watched a profitable year turn into a stress year because they took the wrong work

WHAT'S INSIDE

— 20 red-flag checklist items you can scan in under 3 minutes during a prospect call
— Clear yes/no decision nodes so you know when to walk without second-guessing
— Reasoning for each flag so you understand the *why* and trust your gut

Load it on your phone. Use it before every new prospect conversation. Protect your time.

Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
